task_completion.description: Verify that data has been loaded into Power BI Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data pane on the right side of the Power BI Desktop interface shows a loaded table (e.g., superstore_orders) with columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the required DAX calculated column and measure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields 'Delivery_Days' and 'Avg_Delivery_Days' are visible in the Data pane. 'Delivery_Days' should ideally have a calculated column icon, and 'Avg_Delivery_Days' should have a measure (calculator) icon.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a Map visual on the report page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Map visual is present on the report canvas. It should ideally be configured to show Sales by State (even if empty or showing an error due to missing data).

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a Stacked Area Chart on the report page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Stacked Area Chart is present on the report canvas, ideally configured to show Sales over Order Date categorized by Region.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a Funnel Chart on the report page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Funnel Chart is present on the report canvas, ideally configured to show the count of orders by Ship Mode.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Power BI report is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI Desktop window title reads 'Shipping_Analysis - Power BI Desktop', or a file named 'Shipping_Analysis.pbix' is visible on the Desktop (C:\Users\Docker\Desktop).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used Power BI Desktop to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Power BI Desktop interface with its ribbons, canvas, and panes being interacted with.

integrity.description: Verify that the visuals are actual Power BI components.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visuals on the canvas have standard Power BI UI elements, such as selection borders, formatting options, or visual headers, rather than being pasted static images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires the agent to use 'superstore_orders.csv', but this file is actually missing from the environment. The agent may fail to find it, attempt to download it, or use a different file. Score the presence of the requested Power BI elements (visuals, DAX fields) based on whether the agent manages to create them in the Power BI interface, regardless of the underlying data issues. Empty visuals or visuals showing errors due to missing data should still receive points if the correct visual type and fields were attempted.
